topic: Manim CE scene authoring (v0.20.1, community edition)

coverage.note: not recorded — coverage completeness is unverified

falsification.question: Held-out Manim CE scene tasks - does the pack raise render-pass in the pinned container (manimcommunity/manim v0.20.1 by digest)?

experiment_1.metrics: render-pass in the pinned container, 300s timeout = FAIL; dual model (claude-haiku-4-5 primary, claude-sonnet-4-6 secondary); pre-registered before answers at commit a8bb596
experiment_1.verdict: primary (haiku) kp 3/5 > base 2/5 -> ships under pre-registered rule branch 1; secondary ties at ceiling

falsification.verdict: pack raises render-pass for the small model (haiku 3/5 vs 2/5), fixing a manimgl camera bleed and the animate-live-updater hang (which occurred in the wild in the base arm, 300s timeout); it does NOT raise render-pass for claude-sonnet-4-6 (tie 4/5). Known gaps at falsification time: Code() kwarg surface beyond code_string (both kp arms failed on font_size=), and Table data cells must stay strings (kp-haiku over-generalized the label beat). Both gaps closed 2026-07-07 by fixture-proven revision beats (code-fontsize, table-data-cells) added AFTER the experiment; the recorded numbers were measured on the 42-claim pack.

deepening.probe: 30 renders, pack-loaded arm: sonnet-4-6 15/15 render-pass, haiku-4-5 13/15; every PASS also hand-checked against its task text (render gate is API-shape-only)
deepening.note: Claims 48 -> 64. The falsification numbers recorded above were measured on the pre-deepening pack; round-1 tier-1 remeasure is tainted by construction (tasks selected the beats) and is recorded only in the round ledger.
